actions.bodyTextHead: ◆ AGENTGUARD ... Fleet dashboard / Org-wide agent posture: summary, trend, assets, and findings. Summary Trend Assets Findings

◆ AGENTGUARD ... Shadow AI Report (exec report; against the static-only QA server /v1/* is absent so the page renders its error state; behind the real reverse proxy /v1/* returns 401 -> sign-in prompt)
◆ AGENTGUARD ... MCP catalog / Org-managed approval list for local MCP

result: Every route renders as a real static page with the full navigation shell, the dark security-tool theme, and correct per-page structure and interactive controls. The login page exposes working Email/Password textboxes + Sign in button + Create-org toggle. Non-uniform screenshots captured for login, fleet, and report.
